name: opencode-container
description: Run opencode in a Podman container with per-project isolation

subcommands.name: tui
subcommands.description: Terminal UI mode (default when no subcommand is given)

subcommands.name: projects
subcommands.description: List all projects with isolated session data

container_options.name: --build
container_options.description: Force rebuild the container image before running

container_options.name: --feature-file
container_options.description: Merge .features from a JSON file into the generated devcontainer.json. Later files win on key collision.

container_options.name: --env-file
container_options.description: Pass an environment file to the container. Auto-detects .env in project root.

container_options.name: --no-git-root
container_options.description: Mount the current working directory instead of auto-detecting the git repository root

container_options.name: --no-git-init
container_options.description: Do not auto-initialise an empty git repo in non-git directories
